plugins.name: experience-guard
plugins.description: Research prior experience before any non-trivial task and record outcomes after, so the agent stops repeating known failures. Pairs with the experience-ledger MCP server.

plugins.name: shell-runner
plugins.description: A /run slash command that executes a shell command verbatim via the Bash tool — a fast command shortcut that works on desktop, mobile, and web.

plugins.name: night-run
plugins.description: Set up an overnight autonomous run before you sleep: it interviews you, confirms, then works on its own (improve -> try -> record -> commit) without asking, until your stop time or a wake signal. In-session, not a routine.
